## Hard Gate Evidence

| Gate | Enforcement Mechanism | Status |
|---|---|---|
| NO_LIVE_SEND | `auto_client_acquisition/safe_send_gateway/` + channel_policy_gateway router | ✅ CONFIRMED |
| NO_LIVE_CHARGE | `moyasar_live=False` in onboarding wizard + `live_gate: blocked` in integration registry | ✅ CONFIRMED |
| NO_COLD_WHATSAPP | `tool_guardrail_gateway` + integration registry `blocked_actions` | ✅ CONFIRMED |
| NO_SCRAPING | `tool_guardrail_gateway` blocks scraping patterns | ✅ CONFIRMED |
| NO_FAKE_PROOF | DPA gate in `dealix_customer_onboarding_wizard.py` (raises SystemExit 2 without signed DPA) | ✅ CONFIRMED |
| NO_FAKE_REVENUE | `proof_ledger` only accepts real proof events from real API calls | ✅ CONFIRMED |
